scenario.key_phrase: My friend told me to call, I'm not sure I'm ready

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning, this is Priya from PhysicsWallah. Am I speaking to Tanvi? I believe you had inquired about our NEET courses. How are you doing today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Uh... hi. Actually, my friend told me to call, I'm not sure I'm ready. I mean, I just wanted to know what courses you have.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, bilkul! No pressure at all, Tanvi. I'm here to help you understand our courses. Can you tell me which class you're in right now?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! So you have good time to prepare. You mentioned NEET - is that the exam you're targeting? Or are you still deciding between JEE and NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: NEET only. But I don't know... there are so many coaching options. How do I know which one is right?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's a very valid concern, Tanvi. At PW, we focus on affordable, quality education. For Class 11 NEET students like you, we have NEET Yakeen 2027 - it's a comprehensive 2-year program with live classes, doubt solving, and regular tests. The fee is ₹33,999 for the complete course. What's your budget range for coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹33,999? That sounds expensive... I need to check with my parents first. They haven't decided on budget yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand, Tanvi. But actually, we offer 0% EMI through PW Pay - that's just ₹3,299 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai! Plus you get 2 full years of coaching. Would you like me to call you back after you discuss with your parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe... but I'm still not sure if online coaching will work for me. What if I can't keep up with live classes?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! All our live classes get recorded, so you can watch them anytime. Plus we have dedicated doubt-clearing sessions and mentors to guide you. Many of our Delhi students like you have cracked NEET with our online format. When would be a good time for me to call you back after you speak with your parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Um... maybe in 2-3 days? I need time to think and discuss. Can you call me back then?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely, Tanvi! I'll call you back in 3 days. Meanwhile, I'll send you a WhatsApp with course details and some sample videos so you can see our teaching style. Is this the best number to reach you on?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this number is fine. But please don't call too many times... I'll let you know when I'm ready.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course, I respect that completely. Just one follow-up call in 3 days, and I'll share those videos today. Take your time to discuss with family. Any other questions for now?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, that's all for now. Thanks for the information.
